/bin/zsh -lc "./.venv/bin/python - <<'PY'
from sympy import symbols, Function, Dummy, Wild
from sympy.core.function import UndefinedFunction
cases = [
    (('q:2', 'u:2'), Function),
    (['a', 'b'], Dummy),
    ((('f',),), Function),
]
for names, cls in cases:
    out = symbols(names, cls=cls)
    leaf = out
    while isinstance(leaf, (tuple, list)):
        leaf = leaf[0]
    print(repr(names), type(out).__name__, type(leaf).__name__, isinstance(leaf, cls))
PY"

/bin/zsh -lc "./.venv/bin/python - <<'PY'
from sympy import symbols, Function, Dummy, Wild
from sympy.core.function import UndefinedFunction
cases = [
    (('q:2', 'u:2'), Function),
    (['a', 'b'], Dummy),
    ((('f',),), Function),
]
for names, cls in cases:
    out = symbols(names, cls=cls)
    leaf = out
    while isinstance(leaf, (tuple, list)):
        leaf = leaf[0]
    print(repr(names), type(out).__name__, type(leaf).__name__, isinstance(leaf, cls))
PY"

/bin/zsh -lc "./.venv/bin/python - <<'PY'
from sympy import Function, symbols
from sympy.core.function import UndefinedFunction
q, u = symbols(('q:2', 'u:2'), cls=Function)
print(q, u)
print([type(item) for item in q + u])
print([isinstance(item, UndefinedFunction) for item in q + u])
print(q == symbols('q:2', cls=Function), u == symbols('u:2', cls=Function))
print(symbols([('q:2',), ['u:2']], cls=Function))
PY"
